title: Unique Weaponry
description: Unique Weaponry is a mod that adds new weapons, armors and tools to the game, making adventuring and exploring more exciting.
body:
Unique Weaponry is a mod that adds new weapons to the game.

Check out mod showcases:
- [0.4.0 update review](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=YPasr7lpPWg)
- [0.3.1 update review](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5eyPedl9wos)
- [First look at the mod](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Fp0IZIJgepY)

Grenades:
- **Ignite Grenade** - ignites mobs to fire in radius for a period of time
- **Flash Grenade** - blinds mobs in blast radius for a period of time
- **Freeze Grenade** - freezes mobs in radius for a period of time
- **Levitate Grenade** - sends mobs in radius to levitate for a period of time
- **Poison Grenade** - poisons mobs in radius for a period of time

For every grenade, effect area and duration can be configured through uniqueweaponry-server.toml config file.

Guns:
- **Webber** - shoots cobweb

Staffs:
- **Skullcaster** - shoots wither skulls
- **Infernal Scepter** - shoots wither skulls the way Wither shoots them

Misc:
- **Evoker's Tome** - spawns evoker fangs
